ddls:
CREATE TABLE "political_figures" (
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political figure */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the political figure */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the political figure */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the political figure */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the political figure (if applicable) */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education background of the political figure */,
  "work_experience" TEXT /* Work experience of the political figure before entering politics */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the political figure's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the party was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the party's headquarters */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Ideology of the party */,
  "founders" TEXT /* Founders of the party */,
  "website" TEXT /* Party's official website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each government position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the government position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the government position */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the position */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Responsibilities of the position */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenures" (
  "tenure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenure record */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political figure holding the position */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the government position held */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political party affiliation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tenure (if applicable) */,
  "oath_of_office_date" TEXT /* Date the political figure took the oath of office */,
  "total_compensation" TEXT /* Total compensation for the tenure period */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the tenure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tenures_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tenures_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES political_figures ("figure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tenures_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., researcher, government official, public) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political figure record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the record */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used to access the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES political_figures ("figure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical event */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political figure associated with the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of historical event */,
  "event_context" TEXT /* Additional context about the historical event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_events_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES political_figures ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislation" (
  "legislation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of legislation */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political figure who introduced the legislation */,
  "bill_number" TEXT /* Bill number of the legislation */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the legislation */,
  "introduced_date" TEXT /* Date the legislation was introduced */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the legislation */,
  "co_sponsors" TEXT /* Information about co-sponsors of the legislation */,
  "vote_result" TEXT /* Vote result of the legislation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the legislation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the legislation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legislation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislation_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES political_figures ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political figure making the appointment */,
  "appointee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual being appointed */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position to which the individual is being appointed */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment */,
  "confirmation_date" TEXT /* Date the appointee was confirmed */,
  "term_length" TEXT /* Term length of the appointment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the appointment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the appointment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_appointee_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointee_id") REFERENCES political_figures ("figure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES political_figures ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political figure receiving the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "awarding_body" TEXT /* Body or organization granting the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was received */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the award record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the award record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES political_figures ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public statement */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political figure making the statement */,
  "statement_date" TEXT /* Date the statement was made */,
  "statement_category" TEXT /* Category of the public statement */,
  "statement_context" TEXT /* Additional context about the public statement */,
  "statement_text" TEXT /* Text of the public statement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statement record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statement record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_statements_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES political_figures ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_coverage" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media coverage entry */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political figure being covered */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the media coverage */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of media coverage */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article or coverage */,
  "article_link" TEXT /* Link to the article or coverage */,
  "article_author" TEXT /* Author of the article or coverage */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the article or coverage was published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coverage record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coverage record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_coverage_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES political_figures ("figure_id")
)
